sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65963" key="melesi/pteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελεσίπτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέλος</foreign> B) <sense id="n65963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">singing with its wings</tr_>, epith. of the cicada, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.194</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnasalc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
